author: y4rr
content: Audit-Fix Phase 15 APPROVE. Hub fixture drift fixed: registry_list_models_count.expected_count 18→19 (matches registry source-of-truth), registry_known_models extended with 4 missing models (deeplabv3_resnet50, fasterrcnn_resnet50_fpn, fcn_resnet50, maskrcnn_resnet50_fpn) with verbatim num_parameters from registry.rs. 34 PASS / 0 fail (was 33 + 1 fail). Sabotage probe (count=99) caught by failing test, then reverted by architect after subagent truncation.
